info.name: Access Kit Demo Seed Evaluation
info.description: Synthetic local Postman and Bruno workflows for the Access Kit demo seed harness. No live tenant data or secrets are included.

item.name: Create Demo Policy Draft
item.description: Creates a policy draft from the demo seed harness policy model so the next policy-test request can run proof points.

item.name: Decision Check - Allow Case Plan
item.description: Runs the fast allow/deny decision preset for Alice reading the synthetic case plan.

item.name: Explain Decision - Explicit Deny
item.description: Runs the explain route for the restricted-notes preset and returns the explicit deny reason and relationship context.

item.name: Run Policy Proof-Point Tests
item.description: Executes the policy-test validation mode after the setup request captures the generated demo policy id.

item.name: Create Dry-Run Provisioning Plan
item.description: Creates a non-writing provisioning plan against the mock connector using the demo seed owner-admin preset.

item.name: Run Dry-Run Provisioning Job
item.description: Runs the captured provisioning plan as a dry-run job; provider writes remain skipped.

item.name: Run Reconciliation
item.description: Runs dry-run reconciliation and drift detection for the synthetic mock connector.

item.name: Missing Bearer Token Fails Closed
item.description: Demonstrates deny-on-auth-failure behavior when a protected decision route has no bearer token.

item.name: Invalid Bearer Token Fails Closed
item.description: Demonstrates deny-on-auth-failure behavior when a protected decision route has an intentionally invalid bearer token.

item.name: Export Audit Events
item.description: Exports SIEM-ready audit records after decision, provisioning, reconciliation, and auth-failure requests.

item.name: Export Evidence Package
item.description: Exports local proof-point evidence for the demo seed evaluation controls.
